seoTitle: How to Change Your Name on Udemy: Quick Fix
metaDescription: Update the name shown on your Udemy profile in a few clicks, useful for instructors rebranding or students wanting a more professional presence.
intro: Whether you're an instructor wanting your profile to reflect your current professional identity or a student cleaning up an old display name, changing your name on Udemy is a quick settings update. This covers navigating to your profile settings and making the change.

steps.heading: Open your Udemy profile settings
steps.body: Sign in and go to the settings area where your profile information is managed.

steps.heading: Find the name field
steps.body: Locate the setting where your display name is listed on your profile.

steps.heading: Update and save your new name
steps.body: Enter the name you want shown and save the change.

steps.heading: Confirm the update across your profile
steps.body: Check your profile to make sure the new name displays correctly wherever it's shown.

faq.question: Can instructors change their name on Udemy too?
faq.answer: Yes, instructors commonly update their display name to reflect rebranding or a clearer professional identity.

faq.question: Will changing my name affect my past reviews or course history?
faq.answer: Your name update generally applies going forward on your profile; past records tied to your account should remain intact.

faq.question: How long does it take for the name change to show up?
faq.answer: The update should reflect on your profile shortly after you save the change.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how often I can change my name?
faq.answer: The video doesn't specify a limit, but it's worth treating name changes as an occasional update rather than something you do frequently.
